title: Keeping track of your super
description: How to keep track of your super accounts. Find, recover and consolidate lost super.
keywords: super check, super account balance, merge super, transfer super, rollover super, find lost super, check super contributions, super insurance cover, update super beneficiary, update super beneficiary

child_links.title: Keeping track of your super online
child_links.description: Use ATO online services to track your super and find any accounts you have forgotten or lost touch with.

child_links.title: Super health check
child_links.description: Use this checklist to review the health of your super.

child_links.title: Transferring or consolidating your super
child_links.description: When and how you can transfer or roll over your super to another fund, and how to consolidate multiple super accounts.

child_links.title: ATO-held super
child_links.description: Find out if the ATO holds super that belongs to you, how you can recover and transfer it into an account of your choice.

child_links.title: Inactive low-balance super accounts
child_links.description: What happens to inactive super accounts, and find out how you can recover an inactive super account.
